title: HypurrCo AMAs: StakedHYPE, Valantis Labs and stHYPE’s AMM
summary_title: Liquid staking dominates Hyperliquid: 30% staked in four weeks, ST Hype AMM launches
summary_description: Thunder Head and Volantis discuss why liquid staking will be bigger on Hyperliquid than Ethereum, and how their new AMM cuts arbitrage.

key_moments.label: Hyper Collective intro: largest validator outside foundation
Volantis and Thunder Head introduce ST Hype liquid staking
4.2 million Hype staked, available across all lending markets
Liquid staking solves capital efficiency, unlock delays, manual rebalancing
Sovereign pool mechanism: dynamic fees, native protocol integration
Edison: community codes and AMM mechanism differentiate ST Hype from competitors
Prediction: 30-50% of Hyperliquid supply liquid staked within six months
Future: LP token as collateral, hybrid AMMs between Hypercore and EVM
